feed.title: Bionano Lab
feed.subtitle: Busatto Lab: Advancing research in cancer-derived extracellular vesicles.

entry.title: NLSEV 2026: Coming to Groningen for the First Time

link.title: NLSEV 2026: Coming to Groningen for the First Time

entry.content:
This year, for the first time, the city of Groningen will become the national hub for extracellular vesicle (EV) research.

We are proud to announce that the annual meeting of the Netherlands Society for Extracellular Vesicles (NLSEV) will take place here on November 26–27, 2026, with Dr. Sara Busatto serving as Head of the Local Organizing Committee.
entry.summary: This year, for the first time, the city of Groningen will become the national hub for extracellular vesicle (EV) research.

entry.title: New MSc student
entry.content: We are delighted to announce that Adelina Deoanca has started her MSc position with us.
entry.summary: We are delighted to announce that Adelina Deoanca has started her MSc position with us.

entry.title: New MSc students
entry.content: A big welcome to Laura Sikkens, Sterre Metz, and Kaj Mulder, who are joining us as MSc students!
entry.summary: A big welcome to Laura Sikkens, Sterre Metz, and Kaj Mulder, who are joining us as MSc students!
